mission.title: prometheus: React UI: Select time range with mouse drag
mission.description:
This PR adds support to select the time range with a mouse drag.

https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/54278938/122826300-f9165700-d2b0-11eb-9f7d-949716e34c59.mp4

Fixes #1237

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
